Video.summary: Samantha believes that her 3 year old daughter was molested by her ex-boyfriend's brother, Chad. Chad denies sexually abusing the child and even took a voice stress test to prove his innocence. Now he wants to clear his name.
Video.title: We Tested You Six Times

Video.summary: A woman whose fiancé tried to strangle her still believes he is a good guy; a teen who has lived a life of crime finds her younger sister following in her footsteps and wants to stop her.
Video.title: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Image.alt: Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence
Don't Waste My Time / A Sister's Bad Influence

Video.summary: Bobbie says that her daughter Cindy’s home was filled with so many dangerous animals that she was forced to report her to child protective services because she felt her grandchild was in danger. But Cindy says Bobbie has another agenda!
Video.title: A Dangerous Household

Video.summary: Gail needs more excitement in her life so shes been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back; even wear her bra!
Video.title: Freaky Sex Stories

Video.summary: Nikki finally has proof of Bryan’s trysts with Melissa! Lil Ron slept with two cousins Felisha and Simone. Drew has admitted to cheating 15 times, but his latest hookup with neighbor Shaina could be his last.
Video.title: More Mistress Mayhem

Video.summary: Brooklyn sheds light on why a married woman contracted an STD; Brittany's husband is not the only one she should distrust; Brianna's boyfriend and his accomplice have been using her.
Video.title: Horrible Husbands

Video.summary: Bre has good reason to think Austin is cheating on her; Michael regrets his actions and hopes his plea can convince Bria to forgive him; Jeremy confesses his feelings for another man's girlfriend through a romantic rap.
Video.title: Sideline Chicks Smackdown

Video.summary: Things were going great with his new girlfriend until Roger found himself in bed with her friend; Kandy's boyfriend reveals a secret that could change her generous ways; Dannisha's boyfriend continues to beg for a threesome.
Video.title: Down for a Threesome?

Video.summary: Percy must choose between his baby-mama and his other woman; Mary learns that her fiance has messed around with her friend; Casey wonders whether she should get back together with a man who constantly lies.
Video.title: Baby Daddy Deception

Video.summary: Jewels says her new lover, Alexia, is exactly what she needs in her life and Jewels is going home with her today! Next Kim and Mary have been fooling Kim's girlfriend! They told her that Mary was Kim's cousin when in reality they are lovers!
Video.title: Lesbians, Lesbians, Lesbians!

Video.summary: Ron left Stacie when she was 8 months pregnant for his cousin Audrey and thought he found his soulmate!
Video.title: Wife Discovers Husband's Secret Family

Video.summary: Naomi suspects that her lover is cheating. Two girls force Adam to choose! Lori hates her son’s fiancée!
Video.title: Fiery Ultimatums

Video.summary: TJ slept with her best friend’s man! Chris’ one-night has his girlfriend fighting for his attention!
Video.title: Pretty Girls Fight Dirty!

Video.summary: Katie feels she can save her relationship with Lorenzo by getting a DNA test to prove he’s the father!
Video.title: Will These DNA Results Destroy Our Family?

Image.alt: Will These DNA Results Destroy Our Family?
Will These DNA Results Destroy Our Family?
Will These DNA Results Destroy Our Family?

Video.summary: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she’s the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?
Video.title: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Image.alt: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Video.summary: Emotions are high in this intense story about a young girl allegedly being stalked by her molester. But when the results are read, the truth is not what it seemed.
Video.title: You Better Hope You Passed

Video.summary: David believes his wife Shamonda is cheating on him and that she might be having sex for money! Plus, Matt believes that his girlfriend is a prostitute. She admits she has accepted money and gifts from men, but swears she gave nothing in return.
Video.title: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Image.alt: I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute
I Think My Wife Is A Prostitute

Video.summary: Alvin began to get very distant from his family, so Andrea began a relationship with Chris, a man she met on a chat line. Then, Brittany and Tony have an infant daughter together, but since getting Brittany pregnant he has abandoned his family.
Video.title: You Said I Wasn't The Father

Image.alt: You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father
You Said I Wasn't The Father

Video.summary: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.
Video.title: You Want Him To Be The Father?

Image.alt: You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?

Video.summary: Kya is certain that John is the father. But John says he needs a DNA test because they had a short fling.
Video.title: Heart-Stopping DNA Results

Video.summary: Ritchie received a video that appeared to be of his longtime girlfriend having sex with someone else; Jason's sister-in-law says he tried to seduce her.
Video.title: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Image.alt: I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?
I Saw The Sex Tape, Why Are You Still Lying?

Video.summary: Risha is accused of being involved in her best friend's murder; an update on Tabatha, who revealed on the show that her boyfriend allowed her to prostitute so they could get high together.
Video.title: Murder Accusations Cause Chaos

Video.summary: Dakia accuses her sister of stealing $12,000 worth of jewelry from her home; Dante believes his brother-in-law stole $2,000 from a friend.
Video.title: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Image.alt: Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?
Did You Steal From Your Own Family?

Video.summary: James learned that his new wife may have been cheating with his cousin; Marissa left her doubting boyfriend two days after her baby was born, and now he wants the truth; Lyric wants to prove to Jeff's family that her baby is his.
Video.title: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Image.alt: Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father
Steve, I Hope I'm the Father

Video.summary: These wives feel more like slaves at home, but their husbands don't seem to care until Sally makes them!
Video.title: Marriage or Slavery?

Video.summary: Sally gives a high school girl a makeover so that she stops being bullied by her classmates.
Video.title: Nerd to Knockout

Video.summary: A 17 year old wife wants to confront her husband about his affair that impregnated another woman.
Video.title: 17 and Pregnant

Video.summary: These parents fear that their out of control teens will succeed in ruining their marriages.
Video.title: Teen Terrors

Video.summary: Linda, once teased for being fat and geeky, transforms into a bombshell ready to confront her past.
Video.title: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!

Image.alt: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!

Video.summary: Families confront their out of control stepchildren about issues that are tearing the family apart.
Video.title: Troubling Behavior

Video.summary: Children appear on today’s show to express the pain their Mother put them through which destroyed the family.
Video.title: Angry with Mom

Video.summary: These parents do not see eye to eye when it comes to their cross-dressing children.
Video.title: I'm Not Who You Think I Am

Image.alt: I'm Not Who You Think I Am
I'm Not Who You Think I Am
I'm Not Who You Think I Am

Video.summary: These guests are all in for a surprise when their dreams come true.
Video.title: Dreams Come True!
